title: Bitter Fluffy Indulgent Spanish Pistachio Stir-fry
description: This halal-friendly dish features a blend of bitter and sweet flavors with the use of granulated sugar to create a unique indulgent experience, perfect for dessert.

ingredients.name: Pistachios
ingredients.notes: Choose unblanched pistachios for a nuttier flavor

ingredients.name: Granulated Sugar
ingredients.notes: Adjust quantity to taste, starting with half the amount

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Use filtered water to prevent bitterness from tap water

ingredients.name: Sugar Syrup
ingredients.notes: Can be made by boiling 50g granulated sugar and 50ml water until thickened, let cool before using

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: For dusting to prevent sticking while stir-frying

ingredients.name: Soy Sauce
ingredients.notes: Optional for added depth of flavor

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Drain and rinse the pistachios, then lightly toast them in the hot skillet until golden brown. Remove from heat and set aside.
In another pan, combine water and granulated sugar over medium heat. Stir until fully dissolved, then reduce to a simmer. Let it cool slightly before adding the cooled sugar syrup.
Once both the pistachios and the sugar mixture are ready, add them to the hot skillet along with soy sauce (if using). Stir constantly to prevent sticking.
Sprinkle flour evenly over the surface of the skillet as soon as you start stirring. This helps create a light, fluffy texture.
Cook for about 2-3 minutes or until the mixture is thick and bubbly, then remove from heat.
Serve immediately while still warm, garnished with additional chopped pistachios if desired.
